channel.title: Venture Capital
channel.description: A subcategory of Financial Services & Investing-specific stories, this section includes news and announcements related to diversified venture capital activities and transactions.

item.title: ChatSee.ai Raises $6.5M led by True Ventures to Tackle the Growing Problem of AI Agent Failures
item.description: The funding will be used to expand engineering and accelerate enterprise deployments SAN FRANCISCO, June 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- ChatSee.ai, which provides the failure intelligence layer for autonomous AI systems, today announced a $6.5 million funding round led by True Ventures, with participation from existing investors.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN

item.title: Chptr Raises $5.5M Series A to Build the Infrastructure for Timely, Hyperlocal Media Distribution Across TV, Radio, and Digital
item.description: CityRock leads with participation from Tribute Technology as well as strategic partnerships with iHeartMedia, Sinclair and Hearst as broadcasters back a new model for delivering real-world, time-sensitive community stories to local audiences NEW YORK, June 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Chptr, a media distribution infrastructure company, today announced a $5.5M Series A.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN

item.title: Turnout Raises $35 Million Series A to Put an AI Advocate in Every American's Corner
item.description: Turnout has grown its client base fivefold since announcing its seed round in September 2025, logging more than ten million minutes of AI to support the human-led advocacy platform, which empowers consumers to navigate complicated, bureaucratic processes SAN FRANCISCO, June 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Turnout today announced a $35 Million Series A.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN

item.title: Base10 Partners Hits $2.6B AUM, Closes $850M to Back the Next Wave of Real Economy AI
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO, June 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Base10 Partners announces today that it closed $850 million in new capital throughout 2025, with funds now actively deploying. Debuting its first fund in 2018, the San Francisco-based venture capital firm is known for its focus on Automation and the Real Economy.
item.prn:subject: Financing Agreements
Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN
FNC

item.title: PhoenixAI Raises $80M Series B Led by Sky9 Capital to Power the Agentic AI Database
item.description: The database built for AI agents. MENLO PARK, Calif., June 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- PhoenixAI, the Agentic AI Database, today announced an $80 million Series B funding round led by Sky9 Capital, with participation from Atypical Ventures and Olive Technology Ventures.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN

item.title: Current Secures $80 Million Series E at $1.5 Billion Valuation Following Third Consecutive Year of 70%+ Growth
item.description: Record growth, expanding product adoption, and strong unit economics position Current for profitability in 2026 NEW YORK, June 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Current, the consumer fintech platform helping everyday Americans improve their financial lives, today announced an $80 million Series E at a $1.5 Billion valuation.
item.prn:subject: Financing Agreements
Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN
FNC

item.title: Poetic Raises $50M Series A to Automate the World's Most Complex Enterprise Processes with Reliable AI
item.description: New funding led by Kleiner Perkins accelerates Poetic's mission to automate complex, high-stakes business processes at super-human quality and reliability as compared to traditional AI agents SAN FRANCISCO, June 10, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Poetic (formerly known as Forge) announced a $50M Series A.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN

item.title: Fearn Raises $5.5 Million Seed to End the Two-Tier Patent System
item.description: Funding led by Kindred Ventures, with participation from a16z speedrun, Designer Fund, and Essence VC, will expand Fearn's AI-native patent platform built for a first-to-file world SAN FRANCISCO, June 10, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fearn, the AI-native patent platform, today announced a $5.5 million seed round.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
item.dc:subject: VEN

item.title: Scrum Ventures Expands Hokkaido F Village X for Year 2 with Nippon Ham as New Corporate Partner
item.description: Leading Japanese food company joins global startup co-creation program SAN FRANCISCO, June 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Scrum Ventures, a San Francisco and Tokyo-based venture capital firm, today announced the expansion of Hokkaido F Village X for Year 2.
item.prn:subject: Venture Capital
New Products & Services
item.dc:subject: VEN
